name: provekit-ir-term-algebra-to-jvm-bytecode-core

target.memory: private static int array for the minimal deref and store model

realizer.determinism: byte-equal term JSON and target descriptor produce byte-equal Jasmin text

operationMapping.obligation: target sequencing preserves the source statement order

operationMapping.target: emit c; ifeq L_else; emit t; goto L_end when needed; L_else: emit e; L_end:
operationMapping.obligation: JVM branch selection matches the source conditional

operationMapping.target: L_top: emit c; ifeq L_done; emit b; goto L_top; L_done:
operationMapping.obligation: loop entry, exit, break, and continue preserve source control flow
the function result is the lowered value of e

operationMapping.target: emit args left to right; invokestatic Class/f(II...)I
operationMapping.obligation: callee and argument order match the source term

operationMapping.target: emit c; ifne L_done, or goto L_done
operationMapping.obligation: branch target is the nearest enclosing while exit

operationMapping.target: emit c; ifne L_top, or goto L_top
operationMapping.obligation: branch target is the nearest enclosing while loop head
skip leaves the stack and store unchanged
local slot x denotes the same term variable
the target constant is byte-identical in the accepted i32 lane

operationMapping.target: if_icmpeq, if_icmplt, if_icmple normalized to 0 or 1
operationMapping.obligation: integer comparison results use the accepted JVM int boolean encoding
integer arithmetic agrees with the accepted i32 JVM semantics
boolean operations preserve the source truth convention
load reads the same address in the accepted minimal memory model
local assignment updates the same variable binding

operationMapping.target: getstatic Class/memory [I; emit p; emit v; iastore
operationMapping.obligation: store writes the same address in the accepted minimal memory model

homomorphismObligation.operationPreservation: compile(apply(op,args)) = target_apply(image(op), map(compile,args)) for every mapped operation
homomorphismObligation.equationPreservation: for each source equation in the accepted C11 signature, the emitted JVM behavior entails the compiled equation under the target semantics
homomorphismObligation.contractRoundTrip: contract(lift_jvm_bytecode(compile(t))) = repr_jvm_bytecode(contract(t)) after accepted lifter and morphism receipts
homomorphismObligation.dischargeStatus: draft only, no MorphismDischargeReceipt minted in this crate

refusalPolicy.unsupportedInvariants: refuse non-unit while invariant payloads until invariant discharge is represented

deferred: direct class-file writer and deterministic constant-pool construction
typed JVM references and object layouts
